MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-05-2023 IN DEPT. 206. MATTER WAS RE-CALLED AROUND 11:00AM AND PARTIES WERE SENT BACK FROM DEPT. 305, FOR BEING NOT READY TO PROCEED WITH TRIAL. THE COURT ASKED BOTH PARTIES TO CHECK THEIR TRIAL SCHEDULES AND ALSO THE AVAILABILITY OF THEIR EXPERTS. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL TO OCT-02-2023 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL IS WAIVED. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS EACH PARTY TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE ON MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL, IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION WHICH IS PAYABLE BY E-FILING OR IN PERSON IN ROOM 103 NO LATER THAN 6/15/23. THE COURT SETS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTORNEY RYAN PALUMBO AND ATTORNEY KIRK WALKER SET FOR JUN-20-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY PAY $60.00 FILING FEE ON MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL THAT IS DUE NO LATER THAN 6/15/23. THE OSC WILL BE VACATED IF PAID ON DUE DATE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206) [**AFTER HEARING, ATTORNEY KIRK WALKER, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF PAID $60.00 FILING FEE OF MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL IN ROOM 103. THE OSC ISSUED TO ATTORNEY KIRK WALKER IS SET ASIDE.**]
